message:
feat(dashboard): enrich convoy panel with progress %, ready/active counts, assignees

Add progress percentage, ready/active bead breakdown chips, assignee chips,
and tooltip titles to the convoy dashboard panel. Fix-merge of PR #2286 with
three cleanups: remove redundant assignee guard in counting logic, remove
dead progressPercent template function (replaced by precomputed ProgressPct),
and sort assignees for stable display order.

Closes #2286

Co-Authored-By: athosmartins <athosmartins@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
